name: Auvik
description: Monitor Auvik network infrastructure for device inventory, alerts, and network management compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Auvik at https://my.auvik.com
2. Go to Admin > Integrations > API
3. Generate an API key if you have not already
4. Copy the API username and API key
5. Select your Auvik data region
6. Enter the values below

credentialFields.label: API Username
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Auvik > Admin > Integrations > API

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Auvik > Admin > Integrations > API

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Check alerts from Auvik network monitoring
